findings.message: B1 FIXED: Domain model routing implemented via subagent/model-resolver.ts. resolveModelArg() reads subagent-config.json, matches file extensions against domain_rules, falls back to default domain. INV-10 now verified.
B1 FIXED: agent-mode/tools.ts and plan-mode/tools.ts now use resolveModelArg() instead of config?.worker?.model (which was always undefined).

B2 FIXED: executor-loop.ts created with getNextPendingStep(), isPlanComplete(), incrementIteration(), resetIteration(), markStepInProgress(). Registered tools: loom_get_next_step, loom_check_iteration. Agent executor now has structured step iteration.
B2 FIXED: agent-executor.md prompt updated with execution loop instructions referencing new tools.
W3 FIXED: worker.md — files-to-commit.json now described as JSON array, not plain text. Audit path corrected to reviews/audit.json.
W6 FIXED: reviewer.md — output path corrected from artifacts/review.json to reviews/review-{du_id}.json.
W1 FIXED: SDD file mapping synchronized with actual file names (orchestrator.ts, tools.ts, executor.ts, executor-loop.ts). COMP-spawner now includes model-resolver.ts.
N5 FIXED: SubagentConfigSchema added to schemas.ts with TypeBox definition and validateSubagentConfigShape() runtime validator.
Plan step 2,3 expected_output updated to match actual file names. New files added to files-to-commit.json.

recommendations: All 8 review findings addressed. DU-2 SDD updated. Domain model routing (INV-10) now functional. Executor loop state machine (INV-11) reinforced with iteration tracking and escalation logic. Ready for commit and merge.
